compiled_state.title: Verify .test-index RED markers exist for write-reviewer-findings --review-tier tests
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
Completion verifier claims .test-index RED markers are missing for the 6 failing --review-tier tests in test-write-reviewer-findings.sh. However, the markers were added in commit 9edfa34f and record-test-status.sh confirms RED zone tolerance works. Verify the markers exist and the test gate passes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] grep confirms RED markers exist in .test-index for write-reviewer-findings.sh
  Verify: grep 'write-reviewer-findings.sh.*test_review_tier' .test-index
- [ ] record-test-status.sh tolerates the RED failures
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'RED zone failures tolerated'
